title: Smokers with gerd, try 7 teas today
description: Mentha x piperita teas, also known as peppermint tea, may help with GERD (Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease) symptoms. This is because peppermint tea has properties that relax the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and calming the stomach. The main constituents, menthol and menthone, have natural antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can ease heartburn and acid reflux.  To try peppermint tea for GERD, start by drinking a small amount, about 1/4 cup, after ...
